summary: Canon métier briques typées trimmed from 8 to 5 (Tension, Alternative, Trigger dropped — zero schema instances, zero skill consumer). Snake_case enum convention enforced across R&D schemas. 100% description coverage on profile.schema.json + spec.schema.json top-level fields. Title casing standardized EN. Cartograph gains --incomplete mode. Snapshot-brand: 'Layer 2' renamed product detail page scraping (collision with doctrinal Layer 2), large-catalogue sampling rule added. Stress test panel 32.75/50 (threshold 35), shipped with documented limitations: Tension treated as runtime composition pattern, Antagonist roadmap'd, audit-meta-account v1.2 deferred.
